title: Veritas NetBackup Job
description: Schema for a Veritas NetBackup backup, restore, or administrative job resource. Defines the structure of job metadata returned by the NetBackup REST API including job identification, state, policy and client associations, timing, and data transfer metrics.

type.description: Resource type identifier, always 'job' for job resources

id.description: The unique job identifier assigned by NetBackup

JobAttributes.description: Core attributes describing a NetBackup job

jobId.description: Unique numeric identifier for the job assigned by the NetBackup primary server

parentJobId.description: Identifier of the parent job if this is a child job spawned by a parent operation. Null or absent for top-level jobs.

jobType.description: The category of operation this job performs

jobSubType.description: A more specific classification within the job type, such as the schedule type for backup jobs

state.description: Current execution state of the job in its lifecycle

status.description: Exit status code of the job. A value of 0 indicates success. Non-zero values correspond to NetBackup status codes documented in the troubleshooting guide.

policyName.description: Name of the backup policy associated with this job

policyType.description: Type of the backup policy (e.g., Standard, VMware, Oracle, MS-SQL-Server)

scheduleName.description: Name of the schedule within the policy that triggered or governs this job

scheduleType.description: The backup type defined by the schedule

clientName.description: Fully qualified hostname of the NetBackup client being backed up or restored

mediaServer.description: Hostname of the media server processing data for this job

storageUnit.description: Name of the storage unit used by this job for reading or writing backup data

startTime.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job began execution

endTime.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job completed, failed, or was last updated

elapsedTime.description: Total elapsed wall-clock time in seconds from job start to current state or completion

kilobytesTransferred.description: Total volume of data transferred by the job in kilobytes

filesTransferred.description: Total number of files processed (backed up, restored, or otherwise handled) by the job

percentComplete.description: Estimated completion percentage of the job

currentOperation.description: Human-readable description of the operation currently being performed by the job

attempt.description: Current retry attempt number for the job

restartable.description: Indicates whether the job can be restarted from its current state

suspendable.description: Indicates whether the job can be suspended (paused)

resumable.description: Indicates whether the job can be resumed after being suspended

cancellable.description: Indicates whether the job can be cancelled

activeTryStatusCode.description: Status code of the currently active try for this job

numberOfTries.description: Total number of attempts that have been made for this job

backupId.description: Unique backup image identifier generated upon successful backup completion

ResourceLinks.description: HATEOAS links for navigating to related resources

href.description: URI to the file list for this job
URI to the try logs for this job
